explanation: Substitution of double quotes with single quotes around the User-Agent header value.
Insertion of escape characters before double quotes to simulate equivalent command-line parsing.
Omission of quotes around the User-Agent header value, assuming the command still parses correctly.
Insertion of a space after the colon in the User-Agent header value, which may still be parsed correctly.
Substitution of the short option '-H' with the long option '--header'.
